overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, transitioning from a covered pedestrian walkway with reflective floors and indoor vegetation to an open urban intersection with neon billboards, traffic, and pedestrians. The footage is from a video game engine (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring high-quality cinematic lighting with prominent yellow and pink neon accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with reflective flooring and indoor planters

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered pedestrian walkway, following the yellow tactile paving strip

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in tank top walking toward camera then passing by

entered.detail: dark metal ceiling structure with exposed beams spanning the walkway
highly polished dark floor reflecting overhead lights and neon signs
large rectangular planters with mature trees and greenery behind glass walls
floor-to-ceiling glass panels separating walkway from indoor garden areas
continuous yellow textured paving strip running down the center of the walkway
illuminated commercial sign with red and white lettering visible through the walkway opening

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a covered pedestrian walkway with a reflective floor that mirrors the overhead lighting. Indoor planters with trees line the left side behind glass walls, while the right side opens to the street. The camera follows the yellow tactile paving strip as pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between covered walkway and open street with large billboard

events.description: exits the covered walkway into the open night air, revealing the sky and street traffic
futuristic vehicle passes by on the right side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the walkway as it transitions to an open-air section, passing the Biotechnica billboard

notable_agents.action: futuristic dark-colored car driving past on the adjacent street

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate billboard with green logo and 'BIO TECHNICA' text on building facade
smooth light-colored concrete wall replacing the glass and planters
black metal barrier with glowing yellow chevron arrows pointing forward, separating walkway from street
tall modern street lamps illuminating the road

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway into a transitional zone where the ceiling ends and the night sky becomes visible. A massive Biotechnica billboard dominates the left wall, while an illuminated arrow barrier separates the walkway from the street where futuristic vehicles pass by. The environment shifts from enclosed to open-air.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with large advertising displays and overhead bridge

events.description: passing the large fashion billboard creates a bright illumination on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete wall sidewalk, passing other pedestrians and approaching the overhead bridge structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket walking in the same direction ahead of camera

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertisement showing two figures with 'ROYALE' text, casting bright light on the wall
elevated pedestrian or traffic bridge spanning across the street ahead
commercial buildings with bright neon signage and illuminated windows across the street

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds along a sidewalk bordered by a high concrete wall featuring a large, bright fashion billboard. An overhead bridge structure looms ahead, while neon-lit commercial buildings line the opposite side of the street. The scene is illuminated by artificial street lighting and the glow from advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with crosswalk and heavy neon signage

events.description: approaching the intersection crosswalk with increased pedestrian and vehicle activity
multiple futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection as camera approaches the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the crosswalk at the intersection, navigating through pedestrians and observing traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic orange SUV driving through the intersection crosswalk
group of pedestrians crossing the street in the same direction as camera

entered.detail: broad white and yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
tall traffic signal poles with illuminated lights controlling the intersection
wide open area where multiple streets converge, surrounded by tall buildings with neon signs

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches a busy urban intersection with a marked crosswalk, surrounded by towering buildings covered in bright neon advertisements. Multiple futuristic vehicles drive through the intersection while groups of pedestrians cross the street. The overhead bridge structure passes overhead as the scene opens up to the full night sky with heavy neon illumination from all directions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered, reflective pedestrian corridor into a wide-open cyberpunk streetscape. It begins by gliding along a yellow tactile paving strip inside a covered walkway, where the polished floor mirrors overhead lights and glass-walled planters with indoor trees line the left. As the camera advances past oncoming pedestrians, the enclosed space gradually gives way to a transitional zone where the ceiling vanishes to reveal the dark night sky. The scene then opens up as a massive Biotechnica billboard dominates the left wall and an illuminated arrow barrier separates the path from the active street. Finally, the environment shifts completely to an open-air urban setting as futuristic vehicles pass by in the glow of the city lights.

The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a confined urban corridor into a sprawling, neon-drenched city intersection. It begins by proceeding along a sidewalk bordered by a high concrete wall and a bright fashion billboard, with an overhead bridge looming ahead against a backdrop of glowing commercial buildings. As the camera advances, the narrow perspective shifts and opens up, passing beneath the bridge structure to reveal a wide, busy crosswalk. The scene then expands into a full urban intersection where futuristic vehicles stream past and pedestrians gather under the heavy illumination of towering neon advertisements. Finally, the view opens completely to the night sky, fully immersed in the vibrant pink and yellow glow of the surrounding cityscape.
